query_used: Condition: Subacute shoulder pain | Stage: Subacute | Symptoms: increases with movement, especially when lifting my arm or reaching behind in shoulder | Onset: about a week ago | Functional Limitations: Activities like lifting my arm overhead, reaching behind my back, or carrying heavier objects tend to worsen the pain. Resting the shoulder and avoiding these movements seems to improve it slightly.

final_llm_response: {"summary": "Adhesive capsulitis, or frozen shoulder, is a common condition characterized by pain and stiffness in the shoulder joint. It can be caused by injury, disease, or overuse. Treatment typically involves physical therapy to improve range of motion and strength. [Source: kelley-et-al-2013-shoulder-pain-and-mobility-deficits-adhesive-capsulitis_chunks_1.json]", "disclaimer": "This is a computer-generated clinical insight, not a replacement for professional medical advice.", "sources_used": ["Shoulder Adhesive Capsulitis Decision Tree and Components", "kelley-et-al-2013-shoulder-pain-and-mobility-deficits-adhesive-capsulitis"]}
